name: STIX/TAXII Feed Ingestion
description: Ingests threat intelligence from STIX/TAXII feeds, parses STIX bundles into individual indicators, deduplicates against existing local intelligence, and adds new unique indicators to the local threat intel database. The playbook validates STIX object formatting, extracts IOCs with their context (confidence, TLP marking, kill chain phase), uses AI to assess the quality and relevance of ingested data, and generates an ingestion summary report. Duplicate indicators are logged and skipped to maintain database hygiene.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: TAXII Server
required_integrations.reason: Poll TAXII collections to retrieve latest STIX bundles from configured threat intel feeds

required_integrations.name: MISP
required_integrations.reason: Check for duplicate indicators and store validated new indicators in the local threat intel platform

config.description: Triggers on an hourly schedule or on-demand to poll TAXII collections for new STIX bundles
Polls all configured TAXII collections for new STIX bundles since the last successful poll

data.label: Parse STIX Bundles and Extract IOCs

config.code:
stix_bundles = inputs.get('stix_bundles', [])

indicators = []
malware_objects = []
relationships = []
parse_errors = []

for bundle in stix_bundles:
    objects = bundle.get('objects', [])
    for obj in objects:
        obj_type = obj.get('type', '')
        if obj_type == 'indicator':
            pattern = obj.get('pattern', '')
            indicators.append({
                'id': obj.get('id'),
                'pattern': pattern,
                'name': obj.get('name', ''),
                'confidence': obj.get('confidence', 50),
                'tlp': obj.get('object_marking_refs', ['TLP:AMBER'])[0] if obj.get('object_marking_refs') else 'TLP:AMBER',
                'created': obj.get('created', ''),
                'valid_from': obj.get('valid_from', ''),
                'valid_until': obj.get('valid_until', ''),
                'kill_chain_phases': obj.get('kill_chain_phases', []),
                'source': bundle.get('id', 'unknown')
            })
        elif obj_type == 'malware':
            malware_objects.append(obj)
        elif obj_type == 'relationship':
            relationships.append(obj)

result = {
    'indicators': indicators,
    'indicator_count': len(indicators),
    'malware_count': len(malware_objects),
    'relationship_count': len(relationships),
    'bundle_count': len(stix_bundles),
    'parse_errors': parse_errors
}
config.description: Parses STIX bundles extracting indicators with their confidence levels, TLP markings, kill chain phases, and validity periods

config.code:
indicators = inputs.get('new_indicators', [])
existing = inputs.get('existing_indicators', [])

existing_patterns = set([e.get('pattern', '') for e in existing])
existing_ids = set([e.get('stix_id', '') for e in existing])

new_unique = []
duplicates = []

for ind in indicators:
    if ind['pattern'] in existing_patterns or ind['id'] in existing_ids:
        duplicates.append(ind)
    else:
        new_unique.append(ind)

result = {
    'new_unique': new_unique,
    'new_unique_count': len(new_unique),
    'duplicates': duplicates,
    'duplicate_count': len(duplicates),
    'dedup_rate': round(len(duplicates) / max(len(indicators), 1) * 100, 1)
}
config.description: Deduplicates incoming indicators against existing local intelligence to identify truly new unique indicators
Routes based on whether any new unique indicators were found after deduplication

config.additional_instructions: Assess the quality and relevance of the new STIX indicators. Evaluate confidence levels, check for overly broad patterns, verify TLP compliance, and flag any low-quality indicators that should be reviewed before ingestion. Provide a quality score.
config.description: AI-powered quality assessment of new STIX indicators evaluating confidence, pattern specificity, and relevance

data.label: Add to Local Threat Intel DB

config.description: Adds all validated new unique indicators to the local MISP threat intelligence database
Sends the ingestion summary to the threat intel Slack channel with statistics and quality assessment
Documents that the TAXII poll returned no new unique indicators
